series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with changes to Ohio''s approved Coal Regulatory and Abandoned Mine Lands (AML) programs under the federal Surface Mining Control and Reclamation Act (SMCRA). Ohio has primacy control over coal mining and reclamation in this state, with oversight from the federal Office of Surface Mining and Enforcement (OSMRE). OSMRE approved Ohio''s regulatory and AML program in 1982.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: Paper records be retained permanently. If scanned and saved in an electronic format, paper copy may be destroyed at that time. ; Electronic: Electronic records are retained permanently
